## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Frontend/UI
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] RAG retrieval/generation
- [ ] Agent/tools
- [ ] Eval/tests
- [ ] Dependencies/configuration

## Testing

Commands run:

```text

```

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No `.env`, API keys, Bearer tokens, private documents, Chroma data, logs, sessions, caches, or eval reports are committed.
- [ ] `scripts/check_backend_release.py` passes, or the skipped checks are explained.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or a short visual verification note.
- [ ] API/RAG/Agent behavior changes include focused tests.
- [ ] Dependency changes are reflected in `requirements.txt`.

## Notes

- Add screenshots, request IDs, or follow-up notes when useful.
